name: Victor Aller
abstract: Victor Aller (March 26, 1905, New York City – May 1977, in the area of Los Angeles, California) was an American pianist. He had a successful career behind the scenes in the film industry, and he taught piano in Hollywood, where his students sometimes included actors preparing to depict musicians on screen, such as Dirk Bogarde and Cornel…

concerts.label: New York Music Week Association Awards Ceremony

works.t: Sonata for Cello and Continuo No. 6 in A Major, G. 4: 2. Adagio

about_quotes.speaker: Bill Mays
about_quotes.evidence: I also started studying with an excellent classical teacher there, Victor Aller. And I told him that I wanted to break into the studios and what did he think. What did I need. And he helped me immensely with tone production, with sight reading, and within a year I was doing studio work.
about_quotes.doc_title: Bill Mays interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, December 5, 2025
